title: add PR5 sunset-legacy-tables implementation plan
description:
## Summary

- Adds the implementation plan for PR5 of the unified ticketing migration series
- Documents the sunset approach: drop back-compat SQL views + `*_legacy` tables created by PR1–3, fix stale code references, BATS health sweep
- The actual implementation was executed and shipped as part of PR #572

## Context

PR5 was the final phase of the 5-PR unified ticketing migration:
- PR1: schema + migration scripts (bugs → tickets.tickets)
- PR2: projects migration
- PR3: requirements migration
- PR4: admin UI
- PR5: sunset legacy objects (views, _legacy tables, dead init functions, stray references)

All code changes landed in PR #572; this PR adds the plan document to complete the paper trail.

## Test plan
- [x] Plan file renders correctly (markdown)
- [x] No code changes — docs only
